text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep our space safe and welcoming. Check out the mod guidelines and feel free to ask if you need anything!
Welcome, @guide_sam! 🙌 You're now an event helper. Looking forward to seeing the awesome events you'll help organize. The events team will be in touch soon!
Hey @newbie_kim! Welcome to the community! 💙 Take a look around, introduce yourself, and don't hesitate to ask questions. We're glad you're here!
Welcome, @mentor_lina! ✨ You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members. Thanks for volunteering your time!
